title: Security audit

findings.subject: Committed .env files
findings.recommended_action: Remove committed secrets if any; keep .env.example only.

findings.subject: Secrets in Hermes session logs
findings.finding:
Pattern counts collected; values not exposed.
sk- 970
xoxb- 14
ghp_ 138
AIza 32
CF_API_KEY 61
TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN 276
findings.recommended_action: Run dedicated redaction/rotation review before exporting logs.

findings.subject: Secret management recommendation
findings.finding: Current reality is env/runtime files plus GitHub token; no unified secret manager verified.
findings.recommended_action: Recommend Infisical or Vault for shared ops; GitHub Secrets for CI; env-only only for temporary runtime bootstrap.

recommended_action: Rotate historical exposed tokens and move to managed secrets before tenant scaling.
